package rulecoverage

func PositiveConnectionPoolReconfiguredPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "connection_pool_reconfigured_per_request"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "DB pool sizing or lifetime settings changed on request paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
